'''zhangugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoplasmologist|mycoplasmologist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoplasmologist|mycoplasmologist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhangugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhængigith|zhængigith]] || [[word:zhængigij|zhængigij]] || [[word:zhængigish|zhængigish]] || [[word:zhængigi|zhængigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhangunguguth|zhangunguguth]] || [[word:zhangunguguj|zhangunguguj]] || [[word:zhangungugush|zhangungugush]] || [[word:zhangungugu|zhangungugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhanguguth|zhanguguth]] || [[word:zhanguguj|zhanguguj]] || [[word:zhangugush|zhangugush]] || [[word:zhangugu|zhangugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhangufguth|zhangufguth]] || [[word:zhangufguj|zhangufguj]] || [[word:zhangufgush|zhangufgush]] || [[word:zhangufguf|zhangufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhanguguthu|zhanguguthu]] || [[word:zhanguguju|zhanguguju]] || [[word:zhangugushu|zhangugushu]] || [[word:zhanguguku|zhanguguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhanguguth|zhanguguth]] || [[word:zhanguguj|zhanguguj]] || [[word:zhangugush|zhangugush]] || [[word:zhangugu|zhangugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhanguguthul|zhanguguthul]] || [[word:zhangugujul|zhangugujul]] || [[word:zhangugushul|zhangugushul]] || [[word:zhangugukul|zhangugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhanguguthuthu|zhanguguthuthu]] || [[word:zhangugujuju|zhangugujuju]] || [[word:zhangugushushu|zhangugushushu]] || [[word:zhanguguku|zhanguguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhanguguthun|zhanguguthun]] || [[word:zhangugujun|zhangugujun]] || [[word:zhangugushun|zhangugushun]] || [[word:zhangugukun|zhangugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhanguguthuoro|zhanguguthuoro]] || [[word:zhangugujuoro|zhangugujuoro]] || [[word:zhangugushuoro|zhangugushuoro]] || [[word:zhangugukuoro|zhangugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
